emails.subject: Draft CSA for El Paso
emails.body: Draft CSA for El Paso Andrew, Attached is a rough draft of the CSA. I am still reviewing the version, but it is substantially correct. In the interest of time I am forwarding this for your review. Please note Section 3.4. I am a little concerned about this section from a retail wheeling standpoint. I am trying to find local counsel in Pa to review this section. Please review and lets discuss.

emails.subject: Re: Draft CSA for El Paso
emails.body: Re: Draft CSA for El Paso Thanks Gerald, I'll read through this tonight and get back with you in the morning. Andrew
